patterns.text: Recurrence rate 66.7% (28/42 recurring, 14 one-off), indicating flapping alert fatigue
Noisy hours concentration 66.7% (28/42 alerts fire 2-4am), disrupting on-call sleep/focus time
Owner concentration 73.8% (31/42 alerts owned by alex@brewbean.example vs priya 6, ops 3), single on-call bottleneck
Low silencing ratio 7.1% (3/42 silenced), with alert volume 1.4 alerts/day
Top components evenly noisy: checkout (6), payments (6), inventory (6), matching recurring overnight spikes

refined_purpose.statement: Reduce recurring 2-4am checkout/payments/inventory alerts and rebalance owner load away from alex to protect on-call focus time for BrewBean POS.
refined_purpose.rationale: 66.7% recurrence and 66.7% overnight (2-4am) concentration, with 73.8% owner load on alex at 1.4 alerts/day, drives alert fatigue.

signals.rationale: Direct measure of on-call noise volume for BrewBean POS
66.7% recurrence drives fatigue; reducing flaps cuts noise

signals.extraction: count(timestamp hour between 02:00-04:00 UTC) per day
signals.rationale: 66.7% of alerts (28/42) fire overnight, disrupting focus time
alex owns 73.8% (31/42); rebalancing protects single on-call
Top noisy components each 6 alerts, tied to recurring overnight spikes
